data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Waller Supports September Rate Cut
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller has expressed support for a 25 basis point interest rate cut at the Federal Reserve's September meeting. He anticipates further rate reductions over the next three to six months. Waller noted that unless the August employment report indicates significant economic weakness and inflation remains well-controlled, a larger rate cut in September is not deemed necessary.

data.title: Ethereum News: Ethereum Eyes $10K as Bullish Megaphone Pattern Forms, Analysts Say
data.description: Key TakeawaysA megaphone pattern on ETH’s weekly chart suggests a potential rally toward $10,000.Clearing $5,000 resistance could liquidate up to $5 billion in short positions.Analysts warn of short-term volatility, but maintain ETH is “bullish for years.”Ethereum (ETH) is showing signs of entering a multi-year bullish cycle, with analysts pointing to a technical megaphone pattern that could eventually push prices toward $10,000.At press time, ETH trades at $4,511, with immediate resistance near $5,000. A breakout above that level could trigger as much as $5 billion in short liquidations, potentially accelerating upward momentum, according to CoinGlass data.Megaphone Pattern Signals ExpansionCrypto analyst Jelle highlighted ETH’s weekly megaphone formation, also known as a broadening pattern, which indicates widening volatility and the potential for explosive rallies once resistance is broken. However, analysts stress that volume confirmation is crucial to avoid a false breakout.If ETH fails to clear $5,000, price could retreat toward the 12-week SMA near $3,500 or even the $3,000 support zone.Whales Target $5,100 Liquidity ZoneTrader Merlijn noted that ETH faces a dense sell wall around $5,100, describing it as “the kind of level whales dream about.” He expects whales to target that zone, liquidating over-leveraged shorts and extending the rally.Long-Term Structure Remains BullishDespite short-term risks, analyst Jackis argues that ETH is “insanely bullish for years to come,” pointing to its breakout from a 4.5-year accumulation range. He believes the prior four-year cycle ended in December 2024, paving the way for a new structural expansion phase.Still, he warns that ETH could see mid-term shakeouts, similar to Bitcoin’s $25,000 correction in 2023, before the uptrend resumes, according to Cointeelegraph.ETH-BTC Correlation Remains StrongMarket analysis firm Ecoinometrics emphasized that ETH, despite its resilience, remains strongly correlated with Bitcoin, averaging a correlation score of 0.8 over the past five years.A sustained move above Ethereum’s 2021 all-time high of $4,880 would confirm immediate continuation of the bullish trend, analysts said.

data.title: A New Era Of Crypto Adoption: US Starts Publishing GDP Data On Bitcoin, Ethereum, And Solana Blockchains
data.description:
The U. S. government has begun using blockchains to disseminate key economic data, following Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick teasing the project’s launch a few days ago. Key economic statistics like GDP and the PCE Price Index are now available through Chainlink Data Feeds on ten blockchain networks, marking a first-of-its-kind step to connect public data infrastructure […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/a-new-era-of-crypto-adoption-us-starts-publishing-gdp-data-on-bitcoin-ethereum-and-solana-blockchains/

data.title: Solana Policy Institute grants $500K to defend Tornado Cash developers
data.description:
The Solana Policy Institute (SPI) has pledged $500,000 to the legal defense of Tornado Cash developers Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev, according to an Aug. 28 statement. Storm and Pertsev helped create Tornado Cash, an Ethereum-based privacy protocol that allows crypto transactions to be mixed and anonymized
source: https://cryptoslate.com/solana-policy-institute-grants-500k-to-defend-tornado-cash-developers/

data.title: Crypto News: Token-Stock Comparisons Have Been Wrong All Along, New Framework Shows
data.description:
Key Insights: Token valuations compared to traditional stocks produced misleading results for years due to inconsistent supply measurement standards across crypto data providers. Artemis and Pantera Capital released a framework on Aug. 26 called “Outstanding Supply” that aimed to standardize how investors measured token economics against equity markets
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/28/crypto-news-token-stock-comparisons-have-been-wrong-all-along-new-framework-shows/

data.title: Cardano (ADA) Eyes Bullish Breakout as Grayscale ETF Decision Looms
data.description:
Cardano (ADA), a prominent cryptocurrency known for its innovative blockchain technology and robust community support, is currently positioning itself for a potential bullish breakout as the market eagerly anticipates a crucial decision regarding the Grayscale Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). This pivotal moment could significantly influence investor sentiment and lead to increased buying pressure, further fueling Cardano's upward momentum in the coming days. Enthusiasts and traders alike are closely monitoring the developments, recognizing the potential implications for ADA's price trajectory amid broader market dynamics.
source: https://blocknews.com/cardano-ada-eyes-bullish-breakout-as-grayscale-etf-decision-looms/
